channel.title: GNfood
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNfood, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mexican Street Corn Chicken Casserole
item.description: This Mexican Street Corn Chicken Casserole takes everything you love about elote, tangy lime, smoky Tajin, sweet corn, and creamy…

item.title: New Orleans BBQ Shrimp
item.description: You have to make this New Orleans BBQ shrimp! The shrimp are tender and swimming in a rich, buttery garlic…

item.title: Million Dollar Pasta Salad
item.description: If there’s one side dish that disappears fast, it’s this million dollar pasta salad. It’s packed with crispy bacon, sharp…

item.title: Weekly Meal Plan #86
item.description: Another week, another lineup of easy dinners to make your life a little simpler. This weekly meal plan is full…
